issue-25519/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 11 to Java 17.
issue-25519/pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 17, so the compiler must be configured to generate bytecode compatible with Java 17; otherwise, it will compile for Java 11.

issue-25519/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration to 17.
issue-25519/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 17, overriding or reinforcing the property setting for correct bytecode generation.
